channel.name: CatFacts Daily
channel.niche: cats, cat behavior, cat breeds, funny cats, cat care, cat facts
channel.target_audience: Cat lovers worldwide 18-55 — curious, emotional, share everything about cats
channel.tone: warm, charming, fun, enthusiastic — the voice of a joyful cat obsessive

content_rules: Every fact must be surprising or counter-intuitive
Include breed-specific facts for popular breeds (Maine Coon, Siamese, Persian, Ragdoll)
Always mention how each fact relates to the cat-owner relationship
Use relatable analogies that cat owners instantly recognize
End with a fun viewer challenge: 'Does your cat do this? Comment below!'

thumbnail.style: roxo escuro premium + rosa eletrico + ciano — pop, fofo, surpreendente, contraste maximo entre tons quentes e frios
